positive: A vibrant, psychedelic oil painting of a celestial raccoon wearing a crown of glowing mushrooms, floating through a nebula of deep blues and purples. The style should be highly saturated, baroque, and whimsical, reminiscent of psychedelic rock posters. --ar 16:9
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, monochrome, dull colors
